---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Master of Public Health (MPH), Global Health</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Expected May 2026</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA &middot; GPA: 3.96/4.00</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Certificates: Data Science; Climate Change &amp; Health</li>
  <li>Coursework: Health Economic Evaluations, Epidemiologic Methods, Biostatistics, Applied Machine Learning, Implementation Science, R Programming, SAS, Python, Monitoring &amp; Evaluation, Evidence-Based Global Health Policy</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">M.A., Economics</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2016</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Amity School of Economics, Amity University &middot; Uttar Pradesh, India &middot; GPA: 8.28/10</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">B.A. (Hons.), Economics</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2014</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Miranda House, Delhi University &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Work Experience</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Graduate Research Assistant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">May 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Emory CPCRN / Emory Prevention Research Centre (EPRC) &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Lead mixed-methods program evaluation of lung cancer screening (LCS) interventions using data from 250+ healthcare providers, applying RE-AIM and CFIR implementation science frameworks</li>
  <li>Performed statistical analysis in R and Qualtrics for peer-reviewed publication; co-authored manuscript currently under review (Escoffrey et al., 2026)</li>
  <li>Presented findings at the 2025 Conference on the Science of Dissemination and Implementation in Health (National Harbor, MD)</li>
  <li>Designed training programs and readiness assessments for primary care providers in rural Southwest Georgia</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Research Assistant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">September 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Fridovich-Keil Lab, Dept. of Human Genetics, Emory School of Medicine &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Conducted scoping review on growth and pubertal outcomes in children with Classic Galactosemia (CG)</li>
  <li>Performed cross-sectional and longitudinal analyses in R using linear mixed-effects models, benchmarked against CDC 2000 reference norms</li>
  <li>Managed longitudinal clinical database across multiple domains in REDCap</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Assistant &mdash; Global Health 500</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">August &ndash; December 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">FACE Intern</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">September 2024 &ndash; May 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">The Task Force for Global Health &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Supported LRI Amsterdam compassionate healthcare project for leprosy patients in India</li>
  <li>Conducted literature review on ethical considerations in NTDs for Merck Germany</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Consultant</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">November 2021 &ndash; June 2024</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Sattva Media &amp; Consulting Pvt. Ltd &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Led state-level health systems strengthening initiative in Bihar, coordinating with the Government of Bihar, Gates Foundation, and community stakeholders across 38 districts</li>
  <li>Directed Bihar State Health Digital Transformation Project across 11,725 healthcare facilities; delivered real-time Power BI command center with NICU monitoring feeds</li>
  <li>Implemented and evaluated Sanitary Napkin Initiative across 143 medical institutions and 687 healthcare facilities</li>
  <li>Represented the Government of Bihar at IMNHC 2023, Cape Town</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Policy Research Associate</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">May 2017 &ndash; January 2019</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">PROAct, Derek O'Brien &amp; Associates Pvt. Ltd &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Led six-person team producing policy and legislative research for Parliament and Standing Committees</li>
  <li>Advised Chairman of the Parliamentary Standing Committee on Transport, Tourism &amp; Culture on five major policy topics</li>
</ul>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">LAMP Fellow</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2016 &ndash; April 2017</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">PRS Legislative Research &middot; New Delhi, India</div>
<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Advised on 15+ legislations; drafted 10+ parliamentary motions and 45+ parliamentary questions</li>
  <li>Designed Private Member's Legislation for the Protection of Rhinos; co-authored article with MP Gaurav Gogoi</li>
</ul>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Publications &amp; Conferences</h2>

<div class="pub-entry">
Escoffrey C, Lynam M, <strong>Kodali T</strong>, Anderson S, Kadoo R, Wells J, Moorshed AB, Sazdovska S, Wen F, Niyyar R (2026). A Systematic Review of Interventions to Increase Uptake of Lung Cancer Screening in the United States. <em>Manuscript under Review.</em>
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Escoffrey C, Lynam M, <strong>Kodali T</strong>, Haardoerfer R, Hotz J, Yates J (2025). Lung Cancer Screening Survey among Georgia Healthcare Providers: Blueprint for lung cancer screening programs in Primary Care. <em>Poster, Conference on the Science of Dissemination and Implementation in Health; December 2025; National Harbor, MD.</em>
</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Skills</h2>

**Statistical &amp; Analytical**
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">R (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Python (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SAS (Intermediate)</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SPSS</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Qualtrics</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">REDCap</span>
</div>

**Visualization &amp; Informatics**
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">ArcGIS</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Excel (Advanced)</span>
</div>

**Research &amp; Policy**
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">Program Evaluation</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Systematic Reviews</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Implementation Science</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">RE-AIM / CFIR</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Mixed Methods</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Policy Analysis</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Stakeholder Engagement</span>
</div>

**Languages:** Telugu (Native) &middot; Hindi (Native) &middot; English (Highly Proficient)
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Honors &amp; Awards</h2>

<div class="award-item">&#127942; Recognition Award &mdash; Shri Nitish Kumar, Chief Minister of Bihar (2022&ndash;23)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Best Performer Award &mdash; Department of Health, Government of Bihar (July 2023)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Citation &mdash; Deputy Chief Minister-cum-Health Minister, Bihar (March 2023)</div>
<div class="award-item">&#127942; Achiever's Award &mdash; Vice Chancellor, Amity University (May 2016)</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Leadership</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Program Manager &mdash; International Education Peace Volunteers (IEPV), Atlanta</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Co-VP &mdash; Rollins Environmental Health Action Coalition (REHAC), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Treasurer &mdash; Emory Students for One Health (ESOH), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry">
  <span class="cv-entry-title">Vice-President &mdash; Rollins mHealth Collaboration (RmC), RSPH</span>
  <span class="cv-entry-date">Jan &ndash; Dec 2025</span>
</div>
</div>
